recent_evidence.summary: c02 Ramsey 6-average autosave reviewed provisionally: Raw-exported, plotted, and drift-checked the 6-average autosave of the still-running reimage1804_c02 Ramsey/T2star scout. The bridge remains running at 6/8 averages with healthy counts, no monitor error, and no stop request. Six averages form an even snake-order subset with no drift flags, but target FFT bins remain weak/inconsistent (carrier about 0.74%, det-13C about 1.71%, det+13C about 1.25%, direct 13C-Larmor about 0.97% in the signal-self-baseline view). No T2star or 13C claim is made; continue waiting for terminal data unless a hard anomaly appears. No bridge queue mutation was performed.

Copied latest running Ramsey/T2star bridge status at 21:28 EDT: queued/staging empty by direct check, running phase run_experiment_scan_point, 6/8 averages completed, final count text Final = 45.318 kcps, monitor active with no last_error, stop_requested=false, and no hard anomaly. No bridge queue mutation was performed.

Terminal 8-average Ramsey/T2star scout completed and was raw-exported, plotted, drift-checked, FFT-reviewed, and fit-tested. Counts were healthy (pre-run TrackCenter 43.710 kcps, post-run final 41.020 kcps), scan matched 43 tau points over 0-8 us with det=1.5 MHz and 8 x 50000 reps, and scan-order-aware drift found no flagged averages. Signal readout supports a weak empirical Ramsey oscillation near 1.9 MHz; fit-derived T2* is short/few-us but not a final scalar because early-time handling changes the result. The nominal det carrier is weak and the apparent high-sideband power is ambiguous with an effective carrier shift, so 13C is not established. Recommended next step is bounded weak-pi pODMR resonance refinement before a claim-grade repeat Ramsey/13C test.

c02 Ramsey terminal 8-average review: Terminal 8-average Ramsey/T2star scout completed with healthy counts and no stop/error. Raw export, figure, FFT review, fits, and scan-order-aware drift diagnostic are recorded. The signal readout supports a weak empirical Ramsey oscillation near 1.9 MHz and a short/few-us T2* order, but the scalar T2* is not final because early tau handling changes the fitted value. The nominal 1.5 MHz carrier is weak and the high-frequency power is ambiguous with carrier shift, so 13C is not established. Next recommended experiment is bounded weak-pi pODMR resonance refinement before a claim-grade repeat Ramsey/13C test.

Weak-pi pODMR resonance-refinement execute was submitted after terminal Ramsey review, project lifecycle/queue race check, intent verification, and MATLAB advisory with no blockers. This touches the bridge queue; no further bridge-touching work until terminal/anomaly evidence.
